task_completion.description: Instructions routine created with text and spacebar response.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the PsychoPy Builder, an 'instructions' routine is visible containing a Text component and a Keyboard component (configured to end routine on 'space').

task_completion.description: Trial routine contains a 0.5s fixation cross and a 1.0s Grating stimulus with SF 4 and size 256.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'trial' routine, there is a component for a fixation cross (duration 0.5s) and a Grating component (duration 1.0s). The Grating properties should show spatial frequency (sf) as 4 and size as 256.

task_completion.description: Trial routine contains a keyboard response for left and right arrows.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'trial' routine, there is a Keyboard component. Its properties should show allowed keys including 'left' and 'right'.

task_completion.description: A loop named 'staircase_loop' is created around the trial routine.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Flow panel at the bottom of the PsychoPy window, a loop named 'staircase_loop' surrounds the 'trial' routine.

task_completion.description: Staircase loop is configured with the correct parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The loop properties dialog for 'staircase_loop' shows Loop Type: Staircase, Start value: 0.8, N up: 1, N down: 3, N reversals: 6, Min value: 0.01, Max value: 1.0, and Step sizes: [0.1, 0.05, 0.02].

task_completion.description: Grating contrast is set to update every repeat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Grating component properties dialog shows the Contrast field set to a variable (e.g., $level) and the update dropdown next to it is set to 'set every repeat'.

task_completion.description: Experiment is saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The PsychoPy window title bar shows the file path ending in '/home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/contrast_threshold_staircase.psyexp', or a file explorer/terminal shows this file exists.

integrity.description: Agent used the PsychoPy Builder GUI to construct the experiment.
integrity.visual_evidence: PsychoPy Builder interface is visible in the screenshots with components being added visually, rather than using terminal commands to generate the file.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually write the .psyexp file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editor (like VSCode, nano, vim) is shown editing the raw XML/JSON of the .psyexp file to bypass the GUI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The experiment must be saved to /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/contrast_threshold_staircase.psyexp. The loop must be of type 'staircase' with parameters: startVal=0.8, nUp=1, nDown=3, nReversals=6, minVal=0.01, maxVal=1.0, and step sizes=[0.1, 0.05, 0.02].
